"use strict"; const { stringifyValueForError } = require("./shared"); module.exports = function ({ ruleId, value }) { return ` Configuration for rule "${ruleId}" is invalid. Expected severity of "off", 0, "warn", 1, "error", or 2. You passed '${stringifyValueForError(value, 4)}'. See https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/configure/rules#using-configuration-files for configuring rules. `.trimStart(); };
